title: Weekly Surge In Google Trends For Diy Solar Panel Repair Signals Green Energy Sector Rebound
thesis: Rising searches for solar panel repairs suggest rising maintenance demand as consumers hold on to their green energy assets, signaling potential sector strength. Sustained interest in renewable energy maintenance indicates durable consumer investment in the energy sector.
signal_logic: Enter long XLE when 2-week average search volume for 'DIY solar panel repair' rises 20% above 10-week average
entry_exit: Entry: Enter long XLE when 2-week average search volume for 'DIY solar panel repair' rises 20% above 10-week average Exit: Exit after 6 weeks or when the search volume falls below the 10-week average
position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
implementation_notes: Use Google Trends weekly search interest via api (weekly).
reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Consumer interest in solar repairs spikes frequently due to seasonal maintenance cycles.

schema.idea: Weekly surge in Google Trends for 'DIY solar panel repair' signals green energy sector rebound
schema.behavior: Rising searches for solar panel repairs suggest rising maintenance demand as consumers hold on to their green energy assets, signaling potential sector strength.

market_impact.rationale: Sustained interest in renewable energy maintenance indicates durable consumer investment in the energy sector.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long XLE when 2-week average search volume for 'DIY solar panel repair' rises 20% above 10-week average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 6 weeks or when the search volume falls below the 10-week average

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Consumer interest in solar repairs spikes frequently due to seasonal maintenance cycles.

title: Daily Jump In Usgs Earthquake Activity Intensity Correlates With Temporary Selloff In Infrastructure Sector
thesis: Significant increases in local seismic activity cause short-term market nervousness around infrastructure and construction sectors. Increased earthquake activity raises fears of supply chain disruption and infrastructure repair costs.
signal_logic: Enter short XLI when daily earthquake energy release index rises 30% above 7-day moving average
entry_exit: Entry: Enter short XLI when daily earthquake energy release index rises 30% above 7-day moving average Exit: Exit after 3 trading days or when the index falls below its 7-day average
position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
implementation_notes: Use USGS earthquake activity data via api (daily).
reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Earthquake activity frequently fluctuates daily, triggering reactive market sentiment.

schema.behavior: Significant increases in local seismic activity cause short-term market nervousness around infrastructure and construction sectors.

trade_logic.exit: Exit after 3 trading days or when the index falls below its 7-day average
